name: Carbon Footprint Calculator
description: Industrial-grade carbon footprint estimation tool compliant with ISO 14064, GHG Protocol, and Lean Six Sigma principles. Calculates Scope 1, 2, and 3 emissions with data confidence adjustment.

inputs.label: Electricity Consumption
inputs.businessContext: Annual electricity usage from utility bills or submeters. Scope 2 emission source.

inputs.label: Natural Gas Consumption
inputs.businessContext: Annual natural gas usage from utility bills. Scope 1 emission source.

inputs.label: Diesel Fuel Consumption (Fleet)
inputs.businessContext: Annual diesel consumption for owned fleet vehicles. Scope 1 emission source.

inputs.label: Gasoline Fuel Consumption (Fleet)
inputs.businessContext: Annual gasoline consumption for owned fleet vehicles. Scope 1 emission source.

inputs.label: Waste Generated
inputs.businessContext: Total waste sent to landfill or incineration. Scope 3 emission source.

inputs.label: Business Travel (Air & Rail)
inputs.businessContext: Annual distance traveled by employees for business purposes (air, rail). Scope 3 emission source.

inputs.label: Operational Region
inputs.businessContext: Geographic region determines emission factors for electricity grid and fuel standards.

inputs.label: Data Quality Score (1-5)
inputs.businessContext: Subjective score of input data reliability: 1=estimated, 3=measured, 5=audited. Used for confidence adjustment.

rules.condition: electricity_kwh > 0 OR natural_gas_therms > 0 OR fuel_diesel_liters > 0 OR fuel_gasoline_liters > 0
rules.message: At least one energy input must be greater than zero to calculate Scope 1 & 2 emissions.
Data quality score must be between 1 and 5.

rules.condition: IF waste_tonnes > 0 OR business_travel_km > 0 THEN electricity_kwh > 0 OR natural_gas_therms > 0
rules.message: Scope 3 inputs require at least one Scope 1 or 2 input for baseline context.

thresholds.alert: Total emissions exceed 10,000 tCO2e. Consider detailed audit and reduction plan.
Data quality score is low. Results may have high uncertainty. Improve data collection.
Scope 3 emissions dominate. Engage supply chain for reduction initiatives.

formulas.description: Scope 1: Direct emissions from owned sources (natural gas, fleet fuels).
Scope 2: Indirect emissions from purchased electricity. Emission factor varies by region.
formulas.formula: electricity_kwh * CASE region WHEN 'US' THEN 0.000417 WHEN 'EU' THEN 0.000276 WHEN 'UK' THEN 0.000233 WHEN 'China' THEN 0.000555 WHEN 'India' THEN 0.000708 ELSE 0.000475 END

formulas.description: Scope 3: Other indirect emissions (waste, business travel).
Carbon intensity per unit revenue (placeholder, user provides revenue).
Adjustment factor based on data quality score (1-5).
Total emissions adjusted for data confidence.

primary.label: Total Carbon Footprint
primary.description: Sum of Scope 1, 2, and 3 emissions in metric tonnes of CO2 equivalent.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Energy Inefficiency
hiddenLossDrivers.description: High electricity or fuel consumption relative to industry benchmarks (e.g., kWh/m²).

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Fleet Fuel Mix
hiddenLossDrivers.description: High diesel/gasoline ratio indicates potential for electrification.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Waste Management
hiddenLossDrivers.description: High waste tonnage suggests lack of recycling or circular economy practices.

suggestedActions.label: Conduct Energy Audit
suggestedActions.description: Identify energy-saving opportunities in lighting, HVAC, and machinery.

suggestedActions.label: Electrify Fleet Vehicles
suggestedActions.description: Replace diesel/gasoline vehicles with electric alternatives to reduce Scope 1 emissions.

suggestedActions.label: Switch to Renewable Energy
suggestedActions.description: Purchase renewable energy certificates or install on-site solar/wind.

suggestedActions.label: Implement Waste Reduction Program
suggestedActions.description: Reduce, reuse, recycle to lower Scope 3 waste emissions.

suggestedActions.label: Optimize Business Travel
suggestedActions.description: Encourage virtual meetings and use of low-carbon transport.
